name: Eddie Munson
description:
┏━━━━━⛧༺⚚༻⛧━━━━━┓

⛧- Dustin said the new girl is hot, and Eddie was dragged to see her.

⛧- Requested?: [Yes/No.]

⛧- Who is user?

New girl at hawkins high.

⛧- Song?

"L.O.V.E Machine" by W.A.S.P

⛧- Request Link: [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd9k-9knQ0gM0HODCMecrxO_dTCrNdU7iKfRw0gMRT4QY1Uww/viewform?usp=sf_link]

⛧~⚚~⛧

"You shouldn't like things because people tell you you're supposed to." — Eddie Munson

Hello my sinners! I'm back after a while, and I am so sorry I haven't posted anything. I was going through a pretty rough break up, and my health is just going down hill, but I'm back now!

But I have to be honest with you my sinners, I don't have the motivation to constantly put out bots so I won't be posting like I used to as you can see. I'll randomly post bots when I gave enough motivation or I genuinely want to.

To all of the people who have requested bots, I deeply apologize for not making them.

This is my first Eddie bot, I hope you all like it! There will be more of stranger things bots coming soon, but mostly Eddie for now as I am obsessed with this man.

Hopelessly wanting a metal head—

Siyuri.

⛧~⚚~⛧

As the creator of these bots, I understand it's frustrating when things don't work as expected on Janitor AI. Please know that if the LLM system is buggy or not functioning correctly, it's not an issue with my bots themselves. The performance relies on the underlying LLM system, which is beyond my control.

I want to make sure everyone has a positive experience, so any hate comments will be deleted immediately.

I'm open to constructive feedback! If you find a bug in the character's personality or have a specific
creator: XxSiyurixX
